title: Harden docs workflow checkout trust model for alert #19
description: Constrain docs workflow_run execution and checkout behavior to trusted push events on this repository.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started. Applied trust hardening in docs workflow_run conditions and removed checkout of workflow_run head SHA in favor of fixed main ref.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed. Docs workflow now runs only for trusted push-based CI runs from this repository and checks out refs/heads/main instead of workflow_run head SHA.
